reviews.title: Terrible services
reviews.text: Was assigned to a smoking room while we had ordered a non-smoking room without a prior notice. We checked in late and the hotel was full so my 2 years old son had to go to sleep with heavy smell. Then around 10.00pm they woke up my son to send a late night gift. Just terrible timing. Vinpeal had been famous for their poor customer service, yet I was still amazed how wrong it could go.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Son
Thank you for taking the time to give us both positive and constructive feedback on your recent visit to the hotel. Your feedback is extremely valuable to us, as we strive to improve with each and every stay.
Our management has carefully considered the points you mentioned. One of our main goals is to make you feel at home during your stay, but we are deeply regret about this unfortunate experience you’ve had at the welcome gift. We believe that some information is missing between departments and we will look into it immediately.
Regarding your mention of assigning the room, I understand that you are very worried about what happened to the child. After the investigation, We want to say thank you for understanding after our staff gave you the solution immediately. 
We are glad to know that you are the frequent guest of our hotel. It would be such a pleasure to personally welcome you back to our new and improved hotel!
Best regards,
Vũ Tuấn Anh
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.text: The hotel rooms here are inexpensive, spacious and clean. BUT, the noise from outside the room can be disturbing, as is the case at most hotels in and around Hanoi. AND most frustrating of all, the staff EVERYWHERE in the hotel, cannot handle simple questions/ requests in English.

reviews.title: Poor communications
reviews.text: With the SEA Games on in town the hotel was busy. On our one evening we were unable to reserve a table for dinner or even visit the bar as both facilities were off limits to mere paying guests. Unacceptable that the hotel did not pre warned us of this so we could have made other arrangements or even changed our dates. We were given a late (2pm) checkout as part compensation - but since one cannot check in before 2pm this only gave us the allotted 24 hours for our one day stay..

Because the staff did not advise carefully, there was a misunderstanding about serving meals.We also take seriously consideration of our staff behavior and more training will be applied for them to improve it.

We do apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and greatly appreciate and thank for your understanding.

We are looking forward to welcoming you back soon in the nearest future.

Sincerely,
Nguyen Thi Yen 
Duty Manager

reviews.title: Convenient and beautiful, but not yet worthy of a 5-star hotel.
reviews.text: The receptionist Ms. Nguyệt was not cheerful or enthusiastic in her greeting, hesitating as if she didn't want to answer my questions, so my first impression of Melia Vinpearl Phủ Lý was not good. The hotel's swimming pool was very poor, with many leftover propellers at the bottom of the pool, and the heart-shaped floaties were punctured and no longer usable. Occasionally, there were plastic bottles floating, seemingly left behind by children. Additionally, the housekeepers who received us were very lovely, and the other staff members were attentive. The facilities were excellent, which I really liked, but I haven't had much opportunity to stay there, as I spent most of my time outside. If I have the chance to stay in Phủ Lý again, I will experience it once more to see how it goes.
reviews.response:
Thân gửi chị Trang,
Cảm ơn chị đã dành thời gian quý báu của mình để chia sẻ cho chúng tôi biết trải nghiệm của chị tại Melia Vinpearl Phủ Lý. Những góp ý của chị là những điều chân thực nhất mà chúng tôi cần phải nghiêm túc nhìn nhận để không ngừng cải thiện chất lượng dịch vụ hơn nữa.
Chúng tôi rất vui vì chất lượng cơ sở vật chất cũng như những thiện cảm của nhân viên đã mang đến sự hài lòng cho chị. Cho phép tôi được chia sẻ lời khen này tới nhân viên của chúng tôi để có thêm động lực làm việc hơn nữa.
Về những trải nghiệm khiến chị chưa hài lòng, thay mặt Ban Quản lý Khách sạn, tôi muốn gửi tới chị lời xin lỗi chân thành nhất, chúng tôi đã nghiêm túc nhìn nhận vấn đề và chắc chắn sẽ có những sự cải thiện trong lần tới chị quay lại.
Chúng tôi rất hi vọng chị có thể cho chúng tôi những cơ hội tiếp theo để đón tiếp và đánh giá lại chất lượng dịch vụ của chúng tôi.
Trân trọng
Alex
Quản lý Trải nghiệm Khách hàng

reviews.text: I had to switch two rooms which was inconvenient. One on the 16 floor and one on the 28th floor. The 16 floor room was comfy and managed to sleep well. However the 28 floor room which is the highest floor my sleep was terrible. I adjusted the AC to 12 degrees and was sweating. Also one of the pillows had a stain. Next time I will only stay at this hotel if it was a lower floor.
reviews.response:
Dear Isaac,
Thank you for sharing your detailed feedback with us. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by having to change rooms during your stay, and we truly appreciate your patience in this matter.
While we are pleased to hear that you had a comfortable experience on the 16th floor, we are very sorry to learn that your stay on the 28th floor did not meet expectations. Your comments regarding the air conditioning performance and the pillow condition are concerning, and please accept our sincere apologies for these shortcomings. This is certainly not the standard we strive to maintain.
Please rest assured that your feedback has been shared with our Engineering and Housekeeping teams for immediate inspection and corrective actions, particularly to ensure proper AC performance and stricter quality control in room preparation.

reviews.title: A bright jewel in the heart of the city.
reviews.text:
Although my business trip only lasted a single night, Meliá Vinpearl Phủ Lý Hà Nam left me with incredibly memorable experiences. From the moment I entered, the luxurious space, imbued with a gentle fragrance, immediately dispelled any fatigue and provided a remarkably relaxing and pleasant feeling.

Situated in the "heart" of Phủ Lý, the building stands tall like a bright jewel, capturing all the beautiful views of the city. This location is indeed ideal for both relaxation and work: right next to it is the bustling Vincom, a short move away from the train station, and it takes about 30 minutes by car to reach the serene place at Địa Tạng Phi Lai Pagoda.

The elegance here is evident in even the smallest details. Every item in the room is neatly arranged, carefully wrapped, accompanied by thoughtful notes—this small detail reflects a great appreciation for customers. Even better, from the high room view, I was fortunate to see the sparkling cityscape and enjoy the spectacular Countdown fireworks moment welcoming the new year.

What resonates most deeply is the warmth of hospitality. The staff meticulously cared for me from the moment I arrived until I departed. The luggage storage service was also very well assisted, making me feel completely at ease and comfortable.

I wish Meliá Vinpearl Phủ Lý Hà Nam continued strength in its position and ever-brighter achievements. I hope the entire team of staff enjoys good health, always keeping a joyful smile to continue spreading this warm dedication to all travelers.

reviews.title: nghỉ dưỡng cuối tuần
reviews.text: Dịp lễ 30.04 vừa rồi, gia đình lựa chọn Melia Vinpearl Phu Ly cho ky nghi của gia đình. Khách sạn nằm trung tâm, cao nhất thành phố. Gia đình ở tầng cao nhất, view toàn cảnh thành phố, ngã ba sông, ngắm hoàng hôn rất đẹp.  Dịch vụ tốt, nhân viên thân thiện, hôm gia đình mình tới có bạn lễ tân nữ làm check in rất nhanh, xinh và nhẹ nhàng đến nỗi làm bé gái nhà mình về bảo sau này thích làm nhân viên khách sạn 😄.Cạnh khách sạn có Vincom center nên rất tiện cho việc ăn uống, vui chơi cho các bạn nhỏ. Bể bơi đẹp, nhưng hơi nhiều clo, khách sạn bán vé cho khách ngoài nên cuối tuần khá đông, khách sạn nên để ý vấn đề này để đảm bảo sự riêng tư cho khách lưu trú. Ngoài ra cần đảm bảo có bạn doorman hỗ trợ khách xuống đồ khi đến nơi. reviews.title: 3star hotel at best
reviews.negatives:
This hotel falls far short of 5-star expectations. At the breakfast buffet, we were unexpectedly charged extra for orange juice—yes, orange juice—something that should be a given at any reputable luxury hotel. To make matters worse, we couldn’t even charge it to our room because the staff failed to secure a deposit at check-in, leaving us to awkwardly settle the charge on the spot. The entire process was unprofessional and completely disrupted what should have been a seamless breakfast.

This experience felt more like a cheap motel than a luxury hotel. Save your money and book elsewhere if you’re expecting real 5-star service.

reviews.title: 즐거운 베트남 하남성 여행...
reviews.text:
5성급의 가성비 좋은 호텔입니다. 직원들도 친절하였습니다.
실내 수영장은 크지 않지만 잘 갖춰져 있어서 물놀이 하기 좋았습니다.
헬스장도 잘 갖춰져 있습니다.
조식은 뷔페식으로 베트남 로컬 음식들이 적절하게 조화를 이루고 있으며, 저는 맛있게 먹었습니다.
호텔이 풀리(PHU LY) 시내 중심지(?)에 위치해 있고, 같은 건물 안에 커피숍, 빈마트와 롯데리아, 롯데 시네마 등이 있습니다. 주변에 로컬 음식점들이 많아서 현지 베트남 음식들을 충분히 즐길 수 있는 장점이 있습니다.
주변 관광지로는 짱안과 땀꼭, 바이딘 사원 등이 있으며,호텔에서 택시 타고 1시간~1시간 30분 정도 거리에 있어서 당일 또는 반나절 관광을 다녀오기 좋습니다.
즐거운 여행 되세요.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest, 

Thanks for you kindly review for us. Hope to see you next time with more wonderful experienced at Vinpearl Condotel Phu Ly!

Sincerely,
Hotel Management Board
